title: Nenuu's Legacy Pack
description: My take on an expanded Legacy Edition experience, with old terrain generation, updated biome details, & more content.
body:
My take on an expanded Legacy Edition experience.

DISCLAIMER: I highly recommend allocating atleast 4gb of ram to your instance while running this, it can be played at 2gb but it may cause crashes when autosaving.

Also, the more fine tuned settings will be found by pressing O in the correct menu to access the advanced settings. To change FOV, go to graphics settings, press O to access advanced ones, then change as you desire.

Currently adds the following:
- New Bosses
- Dragons (Tamable!)
- Returns to the old terrain generation
- Gives more life to vanilla biomes
- Returns to the original programmer art
- Utilizes Legacy4J to bring back the old console UI
- The Aether
- The Twilight Forest
- & More!

Bugs are to be expected, this modpack should ideally be playable for now, as of now there are some rendering bugs in the End.
